dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3722 IS: Lowering Home Energy Costs Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to restore and extend certain tax credits to incentivize energy efficiency.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Lowering Home Energy Costs Act.

section.header: Extension of new energy efficient home credit
section.text: Section 45L(h) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking June 30, 2026 and inserting December 31, 2032.

section.header: Extension of residential clean energy credit
section.text: Section 25D(h) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking December 31, 2025 and inserting December 31, 2032.

section.header: Restoration of energy efficient home improvement credit

subsection.text: Section 70505 of Public Law 119–21 is repealed, and section 25C of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is restored as if such section 70505 had not been enacted.
The amendment made by subsection (a) shall take effect as if included in the enactment of Public Law 119–21.
